title: Totem Inventory
description: Totems of Undying work from anywhere in your inventory — no need to hold them in your hand. Lightweight, simple, and life-saving.
body:
📌 **Totem Inventory**

Never worry about holding your Totem of Undying again — this mod makes it work from anywhere in your inventory!


![Totem Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8316c254c8b96e8cb1c49fb39f910d66505d795a.png)

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5975201c42c62fbb478322f3575f0fc68368fc2.webp)


✨ **Features** \
🔄 Automatic Activation: Totems of Undying trigger even when stored in your inventory, not just in your hand. \
👜 Lightweight & Simple: No extra configuration, menus, or setup required. \
🎮 Multiplayer Support: Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5975201c42c62fbb478322f3575f0fc68368fc2.webp)


⚡ **Why use this mod?**

In vanilla Minecraft, a Totem of Undying only works if you’re holding it in your hand.
Totem Inventory changes this by letting any totem in your inventory protect you automatically.
Simple, lightweight, and life-saving in critical moments.
